word: G368 - ἀναντίῤῥητος - anantírrhētos - an-an-tir'-hray-tos - Cannot be spoken against

sections.paragraph:
ἀναντίῤῥητος - anantirrhētos - an-an-tir'-hray-tos

From G1 (as a negatively particle) and a presumed derivative of a compound of G473 and G4483; indisputable: - cannot be spoken against.
